risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI & Autonomous Technologies Value Sustainment, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory and contractual controls.
compensating_control_1.justification: Statutory, Regulatory & Contractual Compliance (CPL-01) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Value Sustainment (AAT-01.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Define Control Objectives
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to establish control objectives as the basis for the selection, implementation and management of the organization's internal security, compliance and resilience control system.
compensating_control_2.justification: Define Control Objectives (GOV-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI & Autonomous Technologies Value Sustainment (AAT-01.3) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
